About

Asia Society's Creative Voices of Muslim Asia is a multidisciplinary initiative using the arts as a springboard to understand the complexity of the many cultures included in the Muslim world.
Supported in part by the Doris Duke Foundation for Islamic Art, Robert Sterling Clark Foundation, and New York State Council for the Arts.

Learn More

Making a Difference Through the Arts: Strengthening America’s Links with Asian Muslim CommunitiesDownload the Report (PDF)

Performance

 / 
New York

Fareed Ayaz, Abu Muhammad Qawwal and Brothers

06 May 2017
8 - 10:30 p.m.

Qawwali is a Sufi devotional form known as the “path of the heart." Fareed Ayaz, Abu Muhammad Qawwal and Brothers are masters of Qawwali Sufi music, weaving together devotional and secular traditions. Part of the Lahore Literary Festival.
